overall.description: A first-person perspective shot moving through a flooded cyberpunk city at night. The camera swims through dark water toward neon-lit skyscrapers, approaches a building with green lighting, and circles a submerged abandoned vehicle. The footage appears to be from a high-end video game with cinematic lighting and atmospheric effects.

scattered objects and wreckage partially visible in the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide flooded urban area at night, with the camera moving through dark water toward a distant neon-lit skyline. The environment is desolate and empty, with only the glow of skyscraper lights reflecting off the water surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded street near neon-lit commercial building

structural overhang extending over the flooded street

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right toward a building with striking green neon illumination, moving under a partial overhang. The skyline shifts to the left as the perspective changes to focus on the building's facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded intersection with submerged abandoned vehicles

beginning to circle around the submerged vehicle to examine it from multiple angles

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling a submerged abandoned car to examine it from different angles before moving away

scattered papers and small objects floating in the water near the vehicle

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the green building and approaches a partially submerged abandoned car. It circles the vehicle closely, revealing details of the waterlogged interior and damage, before swimming away back toward the open flooded area with the city skyline visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, flooded urban landscape at night that shifts from a wide city vista to an intimate exploration of submerged ruins. It begins by gliding through dark water toward a distant, neon-lit skyline where skyscraper lights shimmer across the surface. As the camera turns right, the perspective shifts away from the horizon to focus on a building facade bathed in striking green neon illumination. The scene then moves away from the green glow to approach a partially submerged abandoned car, circling the vehicle closely to reveal its waterlogged interior. Finally, the camera swims away from the wreckage, returning to the open flooded expanse with the city skyline once again visible in the background.
